calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Feb-06-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Confirm Successor Co-Trustees Pursuant To Probate Code Section 17200(B)(1) Or (10)
Off Calendar Mar-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: B. Kyle Childress (Counsel for Phil Bailey and Susan Magoffin, Petitioners).

Mr. Childress presented a declaration ostensibly evidencing the intentions of the bank whereupon the Court took the matter under submission.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.

Petition To Confirm Successor Co-Trustees Pursuant To Probate Code Section 17200(B)(1) Or (10)
Off Calendar Feb-27-2007 Continued To Mar-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Kyle Childress appearing for petitioner. Counsel was informed by BOA that they did not want to decline at this point. They did not think they are in line to serve yet. Bond issue addressed. Trust waived bond. The mother of the minor has been appointed as guardian. Court want a statement from BOA that they have no objections. Matter is continued to 3/13.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.
